children.name: 1. Test Case ID: RMwbeA  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'object'      Schema at /properties/report:          {             "type": "object",             "description": "Error report JSON object.",             "example": {}         }      Value:          null  [422] Unprocessable Entity:      `{"error":"Invalid CBOR bytes, cannot decode Catalyst Signed Document.","report":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/cbor' -d 'm(binary data)' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/document
